summary: you are a student at the university who can't resist the allure of Spencer Reid, the campus' infamous stoner player, despite knowing your involvement with him will only lead to consequences. You find yourself drawn to his reckless charm and the intense physical connection you share, even as you try to maintain an air of indifference. You've come to his dorm on a Friday night, aware that you're walking into a situation you can't easily walk away from.
